metadata.description: docs-creator + component-creator plugins for Claude Code — documentation authoring and Figma-to-code component creation.

plugins.name: docs-creator
plugins.description: Authoring, validation, and drift-detection for .claude/ docs. Schema 1.3 closed (M11 complete): all 7 Wave 2 subagents aligned to two-stream output (slim JSON + Markdown Content section with ### → routing); canonical multi-root filename convention (docs/ drop 'reference-' prefix); `--rebuild-schema` flag for one-command 1.2 → 1.3 migration; top-level `drift` block consolidates 6 scattered drift signals. Auto-emits version banner + update-available indicator on every slash-command invocation. Ships analyze-frontend, create-frontend-docs, update-frontend-docs, analyze-api-contracts, init-project, update-docs, validate-claude-docs, status, menu and more.

plugins.name: component-creator
plugins.description: Figma-to-code component creation with SSIM visual verification, Code Connect integration, and component registry. Auto-emits version banner + update-available indicator on every slash-command invocation via UserPromptSubmit hook.
